title: Interaction Resources, Typed Parts, Conversation State, and Retention · Program Brief: Previous Interaction State
summary: The agent concatenates messages into text, loses function-call identity, assumes previous_interaction_id preserves tools and system instruction, and cannot explain provider retention. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the previous interaction state increment in typed Gemini interaction and state ledger. Learners progress through predi…
objectives: Use previous_interaction_id deliberately, distinguish server-side history from stateless replay, and preserve local audit evidence.
Preserve text, function call, function result, image, file, refusal, safety, and model-output parts without lossy string flattening.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-interaction-state-parts-4
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-interaction-state-parts-4.
# Case 1655: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def worked_agentpy_interaction_state_parts_4(interactions: int = 12, correlated_interactions: int = 12, part_types: int = 5, redeclared_configs: int = 12, ambiguous_state_links: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "authorityworked4",
        "interaction1655",
        "tool4dekrow",
        "stateworked41655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
        "recovery4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if interactions < 1 or correlated_interactions < 0:
        return False, correlated_interactions, "interaction-count"
    if correlated_interactions != interactions:
        return False, correlated_interactions, "interaction-correlation"
    if part_types < 3 or redeclared_configs != interactions:
        return False, part_types, "part-or-config-gap"
    if ambiguous_state_links > 0:
        return False, ambiguous_state_links, "state-ambiguity"
    assert correlated_interactions == interactions and ambiguous_state_links == 0
    return True, correlated_interactions, "typed-interaction-state"
content.caption: Runnable deterministic fixed-fixture pure-Python agent decision model; trace one accepted and one rejected model, interaction, schema, tool, authority, state, approval, memory, evaluation, security, telemetry, sandbox, deployment, or recovery case, then state which provider, Gemini, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, identity, storage, browser, accessibility, privacy, load, cost, or production claim still needs controlled transfer evidence.

hints: For Safe AI agents and Python Sequence Previous Interaction State evidence · Theory Previous Interactio…, name the stakeholder, risk, revision, Python, SDK, API, model, interaction, call, tool, authority, state, budget, approval, memory, evaluation, trace, privacy, security, accessibility, recovery, and provider-transfer boundary, Previous Interaction State precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Safe AI agents and Python Sequence Previous Interaction State evidence · Theory Previous Interactio…, trace this concrete input and predict model request, interaction step, schema validation, tool choice, authorization, approval, result, state transition, memory, evaluation, trace, rejection, stop, rollback, recovery, and controlled-provider evidence before reviewing it: A theory agent engineering team handles case 5105 during a controlled support-operations rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile interaction resources, typed parts, previous identifiers, per-turn configuration, state choice, and retention evidence; model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated; then change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Defend the Previous Interaction State model · Theory Previous Interaction…
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Previous Interaction State: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory agent engineering team handles case 3486 during a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile interaction resources, typed parts, previous identifiers, per-turn configuration, state choice, and retention evidence; sensitive actions require a trustworthy user approval bound to exact arguments; then change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Use previous_interaction_id deliberately, distinguish server-side history from stateless replay, and preserve local audit evidence.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Defend the Previous Interaction State model · Theory Previous Interaction….
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Safe AI agents and Python Defend the Previous Interaction State model · Theory Previous Interaction…, keep Previous Interaction State connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use previous_interaction_id deliberately, distinguish server-side history from stateless replay, and preserve local audit evidence.

checks.pattern: # Evidence: agentpy-previous-interaction-state-1osy4i(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?def\s+evidence_agentpy_previous_interaction_state_1osy4i\s*\((?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?\)\s*(?:->[^:]+)?\s*:(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?interactions < 1 or correlated_interactions < 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?correlated_interactions != interactions)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?part_types < 3 or redeclared_configs != interactions)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?ambiguous_state_links > 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?assert)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
